attrs.name: open_index
attrs.doc: Index of item to be open at render

attrs.name: size
attrs.doc: sm tightens paddings and type for dense UIs (settings panels, sidebars)

attrs.name: variant
attrs.doc: default is the shadcn row style (hairline dividers, no boxes); bordered is the boxed card-accordion. ghost is a legacy alias of default (identical look) slated for removal in a future major

attrs.doc: JS commands to run when the alert is dismissed. Automatically adds a close button with built-in hide behavior.

attrs.doc: 3-6 CSS colors; the aurora gradient is built from them in order

attrs.doc: defaults to a generated id (needed by the pause-offscreen hook)

attrs.name: invert
attrs.doc: auto inverts on light and not in dark; none/always force one look

attrs.name: mask_coverage
attrs.doc: inner/outer stops of the radial mask - widen to flood more of the container

attrs.name: mask_position
attrs.doc: where the glow concentrates (radial mask origin), e.g. "50% 0" for top-centre

attrs.name: opacity
attrs.doc: strength of the glow

attrs.name: speed
attrs.doc: duration of one drift cycle

attrs.doc: show at most this many avatars, then a +N overflow bubble for the rest

attrs.name: label

attrs.name: with_icon
attrs.doc: adds some icon base classes

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: CSS class

attrs.name: beams
attrs.doc: number of beams, evenly phased around the border

attrs.name: border_radius
attrs.doc: border radius of the container. When unset, follows the theme radius (--pc-radius, scaled for panels)

attrs.name: border_width
attrs.doc: width of the border the beam runs along

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: extra classes for the container

attrs.name: color_from
attrs.doc: start color of the beam gradient

attrs.name: color_to
attrs.doc: end color of the beam gradient

attrs.name: delay
attrs.doc: phase offset for the beam (applied as a head start)

attrs.name: duration
attrs.doc: time the beam takes to travel the full border once

attrs.name: easing
attrs.doc: beam motion: linear for constant speed, ease-in-out for a glide, spring for a springy lap with a settle at the seam. Spring applies to a single beam; with beams > 1 motion stays linear so the chase remains even

attrs.name: glow
attrs.doc: symmetric comet (transparent -> colours -> transparent) instead of the sharp-headed beam. Glows tolerate very long sizes, so the size clamp is lifted - great for long dramatic beams

attrs.name: initial_offset
attrs.doc: shifts the lap seam (0-100, % of the path from the top-left corner). The spring's pause-release happens at the seam, so this sets WHERE it springs from. Defaults to 0; spring easing defaults to 25, which parks the release near the top centre on typical shapes

attrs.name: reverse
attrs.doc: run the beam anticlockwise

attrs.name: size
attrs.doc: length of the beam. Also sets how widely the beam swings through corners

attrs.name: aria_label
attrs.doc: ARIA label for the nav

slots.name: trigger_element
slots.doc: custom trigger content. Rendered INSIDE the dropdown's own <button>, so never nest interactive elements (<.button>, links) here - browsers split nested buttons and the toggle binding breaks. Style the built-in trigger via trigger_class instead, e.g. trigger_class="pc-button pc-button--primary pc-button--md"

attrs.name: color

attrs.name: count
attrs.doc: number of meteors

attrs.doc: mirror the shower horizontally, so meteors stream the opposite way

attrs.doc: vary this when rendering several meteor fields on one page so each gets a different scatter pattern

attrs.name: class

attrs.name: close_modal_target
attrs.doc: close_modal_target allows you to target a specific live component for the close event to go to. eg: close_modal_target={@myself}

attrs.name: close_on_click_away
attrs.doc: whether the modal should close when a user clicks away

attrs.name: close_on_escape
attrs.doc: whether the modal should close when a user hits escape

attrs.name: hide
attrs.doc: modal is hidden

attrs.name: hide_close_button
attrs.doc: whether or not the modal should have a close button in the header

attrs.name: id

attrs.name: on_cancel

attrs.name: on_open

attrs.name: title

attrs.name: to
attrs.doc: render a plain link instead of a flyout trigger

attrs.name: link_type
attrs.doc: for plain links: "a" (default), "live_patch" or "live_redirect"

attrs.name: width
attrs.doc: flyout panel width: "sm", "md" (default), "lg" or "xl"

attrs.name: align
attrs.doc: which edge of the trigger the flyout panel anchors to: "start" (default, opens rightward) or "end" (opens leftward). Use "end" for triggers near the right edge so the panel stays on screen.

attrs.name: full_width
attrs.doc: span the panel across the nearest positioned ancestor (mega menu)

attrs.name: current
attrs.doc: marks the active item with aria-current

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: extra classes for the nav element

attrs.name: trigger
attrs.doc: how flyout panels open. hover (default): the PetalNavMenu hook opens on pointer hover or keyboard focus, holds open across the trigger-to-panel gap with a close grace period, and nudges the panel to stay inside the viewport - the convention for a top nav. click: explicit toggle via JS (opens on click, closes on click-away/Escape) - use for touch-first apps that want a deliberate tap

attrs.doc: the LiveView/LiveComponent to send the event to. Example: `@myself`. Will be ignored if `event` is not enabled.

attrs.name: total_pages
attrs.doc: sets a total page count

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: extra classes for the text input

attrs.name: label
attrs.doc: labels your field

slots.name: inner_block
slots.doc: the panel content

slots.name: trigger
slots.doc: the trigger content, rendered inside a button

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: extra classes for the wrapper

attrs.name: id
attrs.doc: the panel id; autogenerated if not set

attrs.name: on_close
attrs.doc: additional JS commands to run when the popover closes (default mode only)

attrs.name: panel_class
attrs.doc: extra classes for the panel

attrs.name: placement
attrs.doc: which side of the trigger the panel appears on, with optional -start/-end alignment

attrs.name: top_layer
attrs.doc: render the panel in the browser top layer so it escapes overflow-clipped containers

attrs.name: trigger_class
attrs.doc: extra classes for the trigger button

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: CSS class

attrs.name: label
attrs.doc: labels your progress bar

attrs.name: label_position
attrs.doc: inside renders the label in the bar itself (xl only); top renders a label row with the percentage above the bar, at any size

attrs.name: max
attrs.doc: sets a max value for your progress bar

attrs.name: value
attrs.doc: adds a value to your progress bar

slots.name: actions
slots.doc: extra controls left of the send button

attrs.name: aria_label
attrs.doc: accessible label for the textarea

attrs.name: edit_label
attrs.doc: label shown in the edit banner

attrs.name: editing
attrs.doc: show the edit-mode banner above the field (set while editing a past message)

attrs.name: id
attrs.doc: defaults to a generated id so multiple composers can coexist

attrs.name: on_cancel_edit
attrs.doc: event pushed when the edit banner's cancel (X) is clicked

attrs.name: on_stop
attrs.doc: event pushed when the stop button is clicked while loading

attrs.name: submit_label
attrs.doc: text for the send button; the default is the arrow-up icon convention

attrs.name: value
attrs.doc: initial textarea value. The field is uncontrolled after mount (phx-update=ignore, so keystrokes never re-render and lose focus); set it later - edit, quote, clear - by pushing a `pc-chat-set-input` event (`%{value: text}`, optional `%{id: composer_id}`) to the PetalChatComposer hook

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: CSS class

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: extra classes for the text input

attrs.name: label
attrs.doc: labels your field

attrs.name: value
attrs.doc: the radio value

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: extra classes for the text input

attrs.name: label
attrs.doc: labels your field

attrs.name: layout
attrs.doc: layout for the radio options

attrs.name: options
attrs.doc: options for the select

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: extra classes for the text input

attrs.name: label
attrs.doc: labels your field

slots.name: glyph
slots.doc: a custom glyph (an svg or icon component) used for every position instead of the built-in sets. Design it to inherit currentColor/fill; recolour the active state with the --pc-rating-active-color CSS variable

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: Any additional CSS classes for the rating wrapper

attrs.name: disabled
attrs.doc: disable the interactive radios

attrs.name: icon
attrs.doc: the icon set. Faces are a five-point sentiment scale (total is ignored)

attrs.name: include_label
attrs.doc: Whether to include an automatically generated rating label

attrs.name: interactive
attrs.doc: render as a radio group: clickable, keyboard-accessible, posts in forms. Requires name

attrs.name: label
attrs.doc: accessible name for the interactive radio group

attrs.name: label_class
attrs.doc: Any additional CSS classes for the rating label

attrs.name: label_position
attrs.doc: where the generated label sits relative to the icons

attrs.name: name
attrs.doc: the input name (required when interactive)

attrs.name: precision
attrs.doc: interactive step size. half renders two hit areas per icon so 3.5 is clickable and posts as 3.5 - pure CSS. Faces are an ordinal scale and always use whole

attrs.name: rating
attrs.doc: The rating to display (integer or float)

attrs.name: round_to_nearest_half
attrs.doc: Whether to round the rating to the nearest half star (eg. 3.3 -> 3.5

attrs.name: size
attrs.doc: icon size

attrs.name: star_class
attrs.doc: Any additional CSS classes for the individual icons. Eg. you could change the size of the stars with 'h-10 w-10'

attrs.name: total
attrs.doc: The total number of icons to display

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: Any additional CSS classes for the star

attrs.name: type
attrs.doc: The type of star to display

attrs.name: body
attrs.doc: The review text content

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: Additional classes

attrs.name: img
attrs.doc: URL of the reviewer's avatar

attrs.name: name
attrs.doc: The reviewer's name

attrs.name: username
attrs.doc: The reviewer's username

attrs.name: render_widget
attrs.doc: fn(name :: String.t(), args :: map) -> rendered | nil

attrs.doc: options for the select

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: extra classes (set font size/weight here)

attrs.name: duration
attrs.doc: time for one full shimmer pass

attrs.name: border_radius
attrs.doc: border radius of the container. When unset, follows the theme radius (--pc-radius, scaled for panels)

attrs.name: border_width
attrs.doc: width of the shimmering border

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: extra classes for the container

attrs.name: duration
attrs.doc: time for one full shimmer sweep

attrs.name: shine_color
attrs.doc: the shimmer colour. A single CSS colour, or a list of colours to blend across the sweep

attrs.name: animation
attrs.doc: pulse (default), shimmer (a moving highlight sweep), or none. When unset, inherits from an enclosing skeleton_group

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: size it here, e.g. class="h-4 w-48"

attrs.name: kind
attrs.doc: LEGACY prebuilt layouts - prefer composing skeleton/skeleton_text/skeleton_group

attrs.name: variant
attrs.doc: the brick shape: block (theme-radius rectangle), text (a rounded line with a sensible default height), circle (avatar)

attrs.name: animation
attrs.doc: cascades to every skeleton inside; a brick's own animation attr wins

attrs.name: label
attrs.doc: what screen readers announce while the skeleton shows

attrs.name: animation
attrs.doc: see skeleton/1

attrs.name: lines
attrs.doc: number of text lines

slots.name: footer
slots.doc: a pinned action row at the bottom of the panel (save/cancel buttons)

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: CSS class

attrs.name: close_on_click_away
attrs.doc: whether the slideover should close when a user clicks away

attrs.name: close_on_escape
attrs.doc: whether the slideover should close when a user hits escape

attrs.name: close_slide_over_target
attrs.doc: close_slide_over_target allows you to target a specific live component for the close event to go to. eg: close_slide_over_target={@myself}

attrs.name: description
attrs.doc: a muted line under the title, for context the panel needs

attrs.name: hide
attrs.doc: slideover is hidden

attrs.name: max_width
attrs.doc: sets container max-width

attrs.name: on_close
attrs.doc: additional JS commands to run when the slide over closes

attrs.name: on_open
attrs.doc: additional JS commands to run when the slide over opens

attrs.name: origin
attrs.doc: slideover point of origin

attrs.name: title
attrs.doc: slideover title

attrs.name: class

attrs.name: show
attrs.doc: show or hide spinner

attrs.name: size_class
attrs.doc: custom CSS classes for size. eg: h-4 w-4

attrs.doc: extra classes for the card

attrs.name: spotlight_color
attrs.doc: color of the glow (any CSS color, ideally with alpha)

attrs.name: spotlight_size
attrs.doc: radius of the glow

attrs.name: event
attrs.doc: push_event name the hook listens for

attrs.name: format
attrs.doc: "text" appends raw token deltas; "markdown" replaces innerHTML with rendered HTML you push (see `to_html/1`)

attrs.doc: event pushed with phx-value-prompt

attrs.name: is_active
attrs.doc: indicates the current tab

attrs.doc: labels your tab

attrs.name: number
attrs.doc: indicates a number next to your tab

attrs.name: on_change
attrs.doc: JS commands to run when this tab is selected

attrs.name: to
attrs.doc: link path

attrs.name: underline
attrs.doc: underlines your tab (legacy for variant="underline")

attrs.name: variant
attrs.doc: match the parent tabs variant. Overrides the legacy underline flag

attrs.name: sortable
attrs.doc: render the header as a sort button

attrs.name: sort_key
attrs.doc: the key sent with on_sort (defaults to the downcased label)

slots.name: empty_state
slots.doc: A message to show when the table is empty, to be used together with :col

slots.name: footer
slots.doc: a totals/summary row pinned under the body - supply <.td> cells (colspan works), e.g. <.td colspan={3}>Total</.td><.td>$2,500</.td>

attrs.name: class
attrs.doc: CSS class

attrs.name: density
attrs.doc: row height. compact halves the vertical padding for data-heavy screens

attrs.name: on_sort
attrs.doc: event name (or JS command) fired when a sortable header is clicked; receives phx-value-sort of the column's sort_key

attrs.name: row_click
attrs.doc: the function for handling phx-click on each row

attrs.name: row_id
attrs.doc: the function for generating the row id

attrs.name: row_item
attrs.doc: the function for mapping each row before calling the :col slot

attrs.name: rows
attrs.doc: the list of rows to render

attrs.name: sort_by
attrs.doc: the currently sorted column's sort_key

attrs.name: sort_dir
attrs.doc: the current sort direction

attrs.name: sticky_header
attrs.doc: keep the header row pinned while the table scrolls (the table needs a scrollable ancestor)

attrs.name: striped
attrs.doc: wash alternate rows for easier scanning

attrs.name: variant
